creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #2)
> Because there's still work that needs to be done on the ports side I think
> it would introduce too much noise -- perhaps we should just rerun the
> WITH_LLD_IS_LD exp-run (PR 214864) once the branch merges to head?

Sure.  Let's go for the defaults for now.
